field_rules.ROLLBACK_OR_STOP_BOUNDARY_REF: local bounded ref to the exact rollback-or-stop boundary for this target
field_rules.SELECTED_TARGET_REF: exactly one local bounded path; no latest lookup; no mtime tie-break; no directory preference
field_rules.SOURCE_EVIDENCE_REFS_JSON: JSON array of explicit source artifact refs supporting the target
field_rules.VERIFICATION_GATE_REF: local bounded ref to the exact gate that would check this target
field_rules.WHY_OTHER_HINTS_ARE_NOT_TARGETS_JSON: JSON array explaining why other bounded hints are context rather than the selected target
field_rules.WHY_THIS_TARGET_IS_LOAD_BEARING: explicit reason the selected target is load-bearing for the runtime patch target question

not_authorized: select target from 13 hints by preference
trigger_meaning: The provider cannot run until one explicit selected target reference and the remaining evidence fields are supplied by the operator.
